name: @windedvertigo/sync-images
description: Shared Notion-to-R2 image sync helper. Each consumer app injects its own R2 uploadBuffer/getPublicUrl primitives so the same download/size-guard/retry/failure-counter logic is run identically across creaseworks, vertigo-vault, and (future) any other harbour app that mirrors Notion images into R2.

scripts.build: echo 'sync-images: no build step (consumed source-level via TS workspace resolution)'
